sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n959" key="a)/grwssa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄγρωσσα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">huntress</tr_>, epith. of a hound, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
